---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature, module, or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / use case

<!--
What problem are you trying to solve? Who experiences this problem
(workshop owner, accountant, etc.)? How often?
-->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What would you like the feature to do? Include UX sketch if relevant. -->

## Module / scope

<!-- Check one -->

- [ ] New ERP module (orders, invoices, reports, …)
- [ ] New chat adapter (Messenger, WhatsApp, Line, …)
- [ ] Enhancement to an existing module — which: `_____`
- [ ] Framework / `core/` change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other: `_____`

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Are there workarounds today? Other approaches you thought about? -->

## Architectural implication

<!--
If this requires a new external dependency / breaks the layer rules /
changes data shape, it may need an ADR. See docs/adr/template.md.
Note here whether you think this is ADR-worthy.
-->

- [ ] This change is local to one module — no ADR needed
- [ ] This adds an external dependency / new infrastructure → ADR likely needed

## Additional context

<!-- Screenshots, references, related issues, market research -->

## I'm willing to

- [ ] Discuss the design
- [ ] Open a PR
- [ ] Test once implemented
